SURGICAL_FACILITIES.source: AHS Find a Facility directory (facility names); metrics estimated
SURGICAL_FACILITIES.vintage: Facility names current as of 2025; metrics estimated
SURGICAL_FACILITIES.verification: All 20 facility names are real AHS facilities verified against AHS directory. Facility IDs (e.g., WDFAB783) and operational metrics (or_utilization_rate, chartered_partner_status) are estimates and not from a published source.

FACILITY_COMPARISONS.source: AHS facility directory (names); metrics estimated from Power BI
FACILITY_COMPARISONS.vintage: Facility names current as of 2025; metrics estimated
FACILITY_COMPARISONS.verification: Facility names are real. OR utilization, surgeon counts, waitlist sizes, and wait day metrics are estimates and could not be confirmed against published AHS Power BI data.
